product: Auto time-to-live for automatic row deletion is generally available ​
tagline: June 12, 2026 Auto time to live (auto TTL) is now generally available.
what_it_does: June 12, 2026 Auto time to live (auto TTL) is now generally available. Auto TTL automatically deletes rows from Unity Catalog managed Delta Lake tables, managed Apache Iceberg tables, and streaming tables based on a DATE or TIMESTAMP column.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 12, 2026 Auto
capabilities.desc: June 12, 2026 Auto time to live (auto TTL) is now generally available.

key_takeaway: June 12, 2026 Auto time to live (auto TTL) is now generally available.
